top_signals.title: Lagarde Says Inflation, Growth Risks Now More Broadly Balanced
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said risks to euro-area inflation and growth have become less pronounced.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Video shows a Ukrainian unit running down a Russian Shahed —the kind of kill the US is racing to reproduce
top_signals.summary: The Army has bought 13,000 of the Ukraine-tested Merops interceptor, locking its maker into a $500 million deal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Citi slashes 12-month bitcoin, ether targets as ETF flows dry up
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: U.S. commercial crude oil inventories have decreased in June
top_signals.summary: For the week ending June 19, 2026, U.S. refineries processed 17.1 million barrels per day (b/d) of crude oil, down 81,000 b/d from the previous week, and they operated at 96.1% capacity utilization. Gasoline production averaged 9.5 million b/d, and distillate production increased to 5.2 million b/d.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: UK defense plan to unlock fresh GCAP contract before Farnborough Airshow
top_signals.summary: The British government came up with essential funding on the day that cash flow for the jet was due to run out.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Traders Boost Fed Funds Shorts in Risky July Rate-Hike Wager - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Traders Boost Fed Funds Shorts in Risky July Rate-Hike Wager  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: U.S. refining capacity decreased during 2025
top_signals.summary: U.S. operable atmospheric distillation capacity, the primary measure of refinery capacity, totaled 18.2 million barrels per calendar day (b/cd) on January 1, 2026-down over 250,000 b/cd (about 1%) compared with January 1, 2025-according to our latest annual Refinery Capacity Report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Adobe patches seven max severity ColdFusion, Campaign flaws
top_signals.summary: Adobe has released security patches for seven maximum-severity vulnerabilities in the ColdFusion web app development platform and the Campaign Classic marketing automation platform. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
